description_long: This is a robust, cubic storage box constructed primarily from vertical wooden planks framed by metallic edges, giving it a reinforced and industrial appearance. The wood is weathered, with visible grain and knots, and one side is marked by red stains resembling paint or possibly a warning. Another side features a prominent yellow and black caution sign with an exclamation mark, indicating that the contents may be hazardous or require careful handling. The top of the box is flat and made of the same wooden planks, suggesting it could be stacked or used as a surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, implying the lid may be removable or simply set in place. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites where secure, visible storage is needed.
description: A sturdy, metal-framed wooden storage box with weathered planks, red stains, and a caution sign, suitable for industrial or urban settings.
description_view_0: This side shows the wooden planks with red stains, framed by metallic edges, giving a rugged and possibly hazardous appearance.
description_view_1: This view features a large yellow caution sign with an exclamation mark on the wooden planks, indicating warning or hazardous contents.
description_view_2: This side displays plain wooden planks with no markings or stains, framed by metal, showing the box's basic construction.
description_view_3: This view also shows plain wooden planks, similar to view 2, with natural wood grain and metallic framing.
